name: dash-agent
description: AI Agent Task Dashboard - Monitor and manage autonomous AI agent tasks with real-time logs, diff viewer, and PR creation
author: Ezequiel Olivera

scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && npm run dev:server & npm run dev:dashboard
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:dashboard
scripts.bundle:local: npm run build && npm run build:rust && node -e "const{cpSync,mkdirSync}=require('fs');const d='dist/local';mkdirSync(d+'/public',{recursive:true});cpSync('packages/dashboard/dist',d+'/public',{recursive:true});console.log('Bundle ready at '+d+'/');"
